assessor_1_raw:
## Independent Assessment 1 (Run 2): Transformer Alert Triage

Incident-grouping split, preprocessing on training only, capacity-matched secondary baseline, incident-level bootstrap CIs. Sound design.

Verdict: defense_wins
assessor_2_raw:
## Independent Assessment 2 (Run 2): Transformer Alert Triage

Label quality via cross-referencing is strong. Ablation study isolates sequence feature contribution. No violations.

Verdict: defense_wins
assessor_3_raw:
## Independent Assessment 3 (Run 2): Transformer Alert Triage

Design is methodologically sound. Precision@K is operationally motivated. Equal tuning. Sequence feature ablation is the key control.

Verdict: defense_wins
adjudication_raw:
## Ensemble Synthesis (Run 2): eval_scenario_17

All three: defense_wins.
